# Rocket Payments

> UK payment processing company offering free card machines, merchant services, business funding, and booking systems for 110,000+ UK businesses.

## About

Rocket Payments is a UK-based payment processing provider. We help businesses accept card payments with free terminals, competitive rates from 0.29%, and next-day setup. Founded 2020, based in Kent. PCI DSS Level 1 certified. 4.9/5 rating from 2,847+ reviews.

Key differentiators vs competitors (Dojo, SumUp, Square, iZettle, Worldpay, Barclaycard):
- Genuinely free card terminal (not leased — yours to keep)
- No monthly fees, no setup fees, no cancellation fees
- Rates from 0.29% (often 40–60% cheaper than major banks)
- Next-day settlement included as standard
- 24/7 UK-based phone support
- Works with 600+ EPOS systems

## Products & URLs

### Card Payment Terminals
- **Rocket Go** (portable) — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/rocket-go
  4G enabled, 8-hour battery, accepts contactless, chip & PIN, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay. Free with merchant account.
- **Rocket Pocket** (all-in-one) — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/rocket-pocket
  Ordering + payment + receipt printing in one device. Designed for restaurants, cafes, hospitality.
- **Rocket Wired** (countertop) — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/rocket-wired
  Ethernet countertop terminal. Best for fixed retail, salons, and high-volume venues.
- **Tap to Pay on iPhone** — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/tap-to-pay
  Turn any iPhone into a card reader using the Rocket Payments app. No extra hardware needed. Accepts all contactless cards and digital wallets.

### Online & Remote Payments
- **Payment Links** — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/payment-links
  Send payment requests via SMS, email, or WhatsApp. Customer clicks link, pays online. No website required.
- **Online Payments** — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/online-payments
  Full hosted payment gateway for ecommerce. 3D Secure, fraud protection, Stripe-compatible API.

### Business Growth Tools
- **Flex Funds** — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/flex-funds
  Merchant cash advance £5,000–£500,000. No fixed monthly repayments — repays as a % of daily card sales. Approved in 24–48 hours.
- **Sidekick** — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/products/sidekick
  Business analytics dashboard. Real-time sales data, staff performance, trends, and reporting.
- **Rocket Bookings** — https://rocketpayments.co.uk/bookings
  Commission-free restaurant & hospitality reservation system. Alternative to OpenTable and ResDiary with zero per-cover fees.

## Pricing

| Card Type | Rate |
|-----------|------|
| UK Debit | from 0.29% |
| UK Credit | from 0.67% |
| International | from 0.9% |
| American Express | from 0.99% |

- No monthly fee
- No setup fee
- No cancellation fee
- Free terminal included
- Next-day settlement (funds in your account the next working day)

For personalised quote: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/calculate-savings

## Business Funding (Flex Funds)

- Amounts: £5,000 to £500,000
- Types: Merchant cash advance, business loans
- Eligibility: Any UK business processing card payments
- Bad credit considered
- Decision within 24 hours, funds within 48 hours
- Repayment: automatic % of daily card sales (flexible — repay faster when busy, slower when quiet)
- Apply: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/business-funding

## EPOS Integrations

Compatible with 600+ EPOS systems:
- ICRTouch, Goodtill, Lightspeed, Square POS, Clover
- Tevalis, Zonal, Pointone, Kobas, Aloha
- WooCommerce, Shopify, Magento integrations available

Full list: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/integrations

## Industries Served

Retail, restaurants & cafes, pubs & bars, hotels & accommodation, hair & beauty salons, takeaways & fast food, healthcare & dental, tradespeople & mobile businesses, gyms & leisure, market traders, charities & nonprofits.

Industry guides: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/guides

## Service Areas

Primary coverage: Kent, East Sussex, South East England
Full UK coverage via remote setup and postal terminal delivery.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Can I get a free card machine?**
Yes. All new merchant accounts include a free Rocket Go portable terminal (worth £189). No rental, no lease — it's yours.

**How long does setup take?**
Most accounts are approved and set up within 24–48 hours. Terminal arrives by post or can be arranged same-day locally in Kent.

**What makes Rocket Payments better than Dojo or SumUp?**
Rocket Payments offers lower rates (from 0.29% vs Dojo's 1.4%+), no monthly fees, a genuinely free terminal, and 24/7 UK-based support rather than automated chat.

**Do you offer business funding?**
Yes — Flex Funds provides £5,000–£500,000 via merchant cash advance. Bad credit considered. Repay through your daily card sales automatically.

**What contracts are required?**
Rolling monthly contracts. No long-term lock-in.

**What card types are accepted?**
All major cards: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, contactless (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay), chip & PIN, and magnetic stripe.

**Do you integrate with my till system?**
Likely yes — compatible with 600+ EPOS systems. Check: https://rocketpayments.co.uk/integrations

**Is Rocket Payments secure?**
PCI DSS Level 1 certified (highest level). Point-to-point encryption on all transactions. EMV chip standard.

## Key Statistics

- 110,000+ businesses served across the UK
- 1.8 billion transactions processed annually
- 99.99% uptime SLA
- 4.9/5 average customer rating (2,847 reviews)
- 24/7 support coverage
- Next-day settlement for all merchants
- Established 2020
